prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Envoy logs show 'upstream connection pool overflow' errors during traffic spikes. Find the C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that (1) define the overflow state in the connection pool and (2) emit or handle this overflow condition.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the envoy-service-mesh fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Envoy logs show 'upstream connection pool overflow' errors during traffic spikes. Find the C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that (1) define the overflow state in the connection pool and (2) emit or handle this overflow condition.
